assessment.note: Says the launch went well but she feels flatter than expected this week, which is a mild negative engagement signal; also hints at wellbeing, but that is off-signature.

new_queue.label: Flatter than expected
new_queue.name: You said 'flatter than I expected' — what's driving that?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific flatness she named to locate whether it is recovery, letdown, or something unresolved.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Mentoring shape
new_queue.name: What would mentoring actually look like in your week if you made space for it?
new_queue.description: Turns the mentoring thread into a concrete ownership and time question.

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we’ve covered, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes by narrowing to a concrete next focus without opening a new thread.
